title: Pipeline Handoff
description: Machine-readable handoff artifact passed between pipeline phases. Lives at .claude/handoff.json in target projects.

feature.description: Feature name or identifier. Used to disambiguate handoffs in multi-feature workflows.

phase.description: Pipeline phase that produced this handoff (1=specify, 2=architect, 3=test-design, 4=security, 5=implement, 6=review, 7=document).

goal.description: What the next phase should accomplish. One sentence.

scope.description: What is in scope for the next phase. Be explicit about boundaries.

constraints.description: Hard constraints the next phase must respect (e.g. 'no new dependencies', 'must support offline mode').

relevant_files.description: File paths the next phase should read. These are the ONLY files the next agent should open initially.

acceptance_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria IDs (e.g. 'AC-1', 'AC-2') that the next phase must satisfy.

verification_commands.description: Commands to run to verify the next phase's output (e.g. 'pnpm test', 'pnpm lint').

known_risks.description: Known risks or open questions for the next phase to be aware of.

source_spec.description: Resolvable pointer to the originating spec: PRD path (e.g. 'docs/features/<feature>/prd.md'), ticket path (e.g. 'docs/issues/tickets/ISS-NNN.md'), or GitHub issue URL. Must be relative to project root (no '..' segments, no absolute paths). URL values restricted to github.com. Must not be used as an executable path.

produced_by.description: Agent role that produced this handoff (e.g. 'architect', 'qa').

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this handoff was written.

checkpoint_pending.description: Set when the command has stopped at a human checkpoint and is awaiting user input. Values: 'clarification' (specify gate) or 'architecture-review' (architect gate). Clear this field when the checkpoint is resolved.
